info.title: Zoho CRM Holidays API
info.description: Manage business and shift holidays in Zoho CRM. This API allows you to create, retrieve, update, and delete holidays that affect business hours and shift schedules. Business holidays apply to all users while shift holidays apply to specific shift configurations.

tags.name: Holidays
tags.description: Operations for managing holidays that affect business hours and shift schedules

get.description: Retrieves a list of holidays filtered by year, type (business or shift), and shift ID. Business holidays apply organization-wide, while shift holidays are specific to configured shifts. Returns paginated results with metadata.

200.description: Success - Returns a paginated list of holidays matching the specified filter criteria

holidays.description: Array of holiday objects matching the filter criteria

name.description: Name of the holiday. Cannot contain special characters: #, %, ^, &, *

date.description: Date of the holiday in YYYY-MM-DD format. Must be within current or next financial year.

type.description: Type of holiday: business_holiday applies to all users, shift_holiday applies to specific shifts

shift_hour.description: Shift hour configuration associated with this holiday (required for shift_holiday type)

id.description: Unique identifier of the shift hour

per_page.description: Number of records returned per page

count.description: Total number of records returned in this response

more_records.description: Indicates whether more records are available on subsequent pages

schema.description: The Response body of the object.

204.description: No Content - No holidays found matching the specified filter criteria

schema.description: The Response body of the object.

post.description: Creates one or more holidays with specified names, dates, types, and associated shift hours. Each holiday must have a unique name and date combination. Business holidays apply to all users, while shift holidays require a valid shift_hour association.

requestBody.description: Request body containing an array of holidays to create. Each holiday must include a name, date, type, and shift_hour association (for shift holidays).

holidays.description: Array of holiday objects to create. Maximum 52 holidays allowed per type per year.

name.description: Name of the holiday. Cannot contain special characters: #, %, ^, &, *

date.description: Date of the holiday in YYYY-MM-DD format. Must be within current or next financial year.

type.description: Type of holiday: business_holiday applies to all users, shift_holiday applies to specific shifts

shift_hour.description: Shift hour association (required when type is shift_holiday, should be null or omitted for business_holiday)

id.description: Unique identifier of the shift hour

per_page.description: The Per page of the object.

more_records.description: The More records of the object.

schema.description: The Request body of the object.

id.description: The unique identifier of the holiday

schema.description: The Response body of the object.
The Response body of the object.

put.description: Updates one or more existing holidays by their IDs with new names, dates, or shift hour associations.

requestBody.description: Request body containing an array of holidays to update. Each holiday must include its ID along with the fields to update.

holidays.description: Array of holiday objects to update with their IDs and new values

name.description: Name of the holiday. Cannot contain special characters: #, %, ^, &, *

date.description: Date of the holiday in YYYY-MM-DD format. Must be within current or next financial year.

type.description: Type of holiday: business_holiday applies to all users, shift_holiday applies to specific shifts

shift_hour.description: Shift hour association (required when type is shift_holiday)

id.description: Unique identifier of the shift hour
Unique identifier of the holiday to update

per_page.description: The Per page of the object.

more_records.description: The More records of the object.

schema.description: The Request body of the object.

200.description: Success - Holidays updated successfully. Returns array of result objects with status for each holiday.

holidays.description: Array of operation results for each holiday update request

code.description: Result code indicating success or failure

details.description: Additional details about the operation result

id.description: The ID of the updated holiday

schema.description: The Response body of the object.
The Response body of the object.

put.description: Updates a specific holiday identified by its ID. You can modify the holiday's name (max 80 characters, no special characters: #, %, ^, &, *) or date (must be within current or next financial year). Provide only the fields you want to update.

requestBody.description: Request body containing the fields to update for the holiday. Provide only the fields you wish to change.

holidays.description: Array containing a single holiday object with fields to update

name.description: New name for the holiday. Cannot contain special characters: #, %, ^, &, *. Set to null to keep existing value.

date.description: New date for the holiday in YYYY-MM-DD format. Must be within current or next financial year. Set to null to keep existing value.

schema.description: The Request body of the object.

id.description: The unique identifier of the holiday

schema.description: The Response body of the object.

oneOf.description: Error response for multiple business hours creation attempt

holidays.description: The Holidays of the array inside error object.

get.description: Retrieves complete details of a specific holiday by its unique identifier, including its name, date, type, associated shift hour (if applicable), and year.

shift_hour.description: The Shift hour of the object.

per_page.description: The Per page of the object.

more_records.description: The More records of the object.

schema.description: The Response body of the object.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a specific holiday identified by its ID. This operation is irreversible. Ensure the holiday ID is valid before deletion to avoid errors.

schema.description: The Response body of the object.

id.description: The unique identifier of the holiday

Year.name: year
Year.description: Filter holidays by year. Must be a valid 4-digit year value within a reasonable range.

Type.name: type
Type.description: Filter holidays by type: business holidays apply to all users, shift holidays apply to specific shifts

ShiftId.name: shift_id
ShiftId.description: Filter holidays by shift hour ID. Required when filtering by shift_holiday type. Must be a valid numeric string identifier.

schema.description: The Shift id of the object.

HolidayId.name: holidayId
HolidayId.description: Unique identifier of the holiday. Must be a valid numeric string identifier.

schema.description: The Holiday id of the object.

ForbiddenError.description: Forbidden - insufficient permissions to perform this operation

schema.description: The Response body of the object.
